channel.title: website on apio: microservices platform to create custom business softwares easily
channel.description: Recent content in website on apio: microservices platform to create custom business softwares easily

item.title: How to Create a Simple Email Sign Up with Waitress
item.description: Are you struggling with finding a FREE service to collect emails? Are you overwhelmed by all those fancy features provided by email marketing solutions? In this post, we will show you how to set up subscription sign-up form for your website in less than 10 minutes and without using email marketing platforms. It only takes five steps to set up email sign up form with Waitress, the lightweight API enables you to use Google Sheet as a data store and send subscribers’ data from the sign-up form to Google Sheet.
